title: Retractable Ballpoint Pens, Pack of 5 Pens Black Ink, Smooth Writing Ballpoint Pens for Writing, Note-Taking & Everyday Use, Great for Office, School & Home
features: These EziGlide Black retractable ballpoint pens delivers smooth, consistent lines, making it ideal for everyday tasks. Designed for comfort, and perfect for writing, note-taking, sketching and more.

Perfect for notes, journals, or signatures, this ink pen blends precision with fluidity. Our Black ballpoint pens ensure bold lines with smooth-flow ultra-glide ink technology, these pens deliver quick-drying strokes every time.
Colourful ink in your choice of 5 vivid shades adds fun to every page, offering a range of bright alternative pens, great for notes, jottings, bullet points, doodling and mind mapping.
5 Pack of Reliable and easy flowing pens that produces clean lines from beginning to end, 1mm medium point nibs which distributes ink perfectly on the page
EziGlide Assorted Retractable Ballpoint Pens, Pack of 5 Pens Black Ink
